core-crust.question: Who runs the core — who's still outside?

templates.default: {name} sits in the {corner} corner — business coreness {bc}, investor coreness {ic}.

default.sentence: 7 of 59 dual-wired companies sit in the prospect corner — investor-core but business-crust — led by Vercel (AI SDK), Revolut, and Ambience Healthcare.
